ForwardControlFlowIntegrity.cpp File Reference

A pass that instruments code with fast checks for indirect calls and hooks for a function to check violations. More...

#include "llvm/ADT/SmallVector.h"
#include "llvm/ADT/Statistic.h"
#include "llvm/Analysis/JumpInstrTableInfo.h"
#include "llvm/CodeGen/ForwardControlFlowIntegrity.h"

Detailed Description

A pass that instruments code with fast checks for indirect calls and hooks for a function to check violations.
